mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_dispatch_driver_route (nx_cddr_plan_id, nx_cddr_community_id, nx_cddr_driver_user_id, nx_cddr_route_status, nx_cddr_loading_entered_at, nx_cddr_actual_depart_at, nx_cddr_stop_count) values (#{nxCddrPlanId}, #{nxCddrCommunityId}, #{nxCddrDriverUserId}, #{nxCddrRouteStatus}, #{nxCddrLoadingEnteredAt}, #{nxCddrActualDepartAt}, #{nxCddrStopCount})
